query.description: Exact match on identifier or phone number (e.g. CI-ABJ-00001 or +2250701234567)

response.name: 422 Unprocessable Entity — Validation error
200 OK — Outstanding debts (oldest first, FIFO order)

query.description: Filter by payment method: cash | credit

response.name: 200 OK — Paginated list of transactions

response.name: 422 Unprocessable Entity — Validation error

request.description: interest_rate is a percentage (e.g. send 10 for 10%, 5.35 for 5.35%). Omit it to use the server default (DEFAULT_INTEREST_RATE env, currently 10%). Provide it to override per-transaction.

response.name: 201 Created — Credit transaction created (debt recorded)
response.body:
{
  "data": {
    "id": 2,

      "id": 2,

}
